titleStmt.title: SII 10.281: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 281. (A.R. No. 141 of 1917.) ON A PILLAR OF THE MADHYARANGA OF THE TEMPLE OF DANDĒŚVARASVĀMI, PRATTIPĀḌU, GUNTUR TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1156.

summary.p: Gives a list of Brahmins to whom Kōṭa Gaṇapatidēva made gifts of land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīdhānīrājadhā nyurvyā masti
svastimatī purī . ya trāmarēśō
lōkēśaḥ śaṁkarō lōkaśaṁkaraḥ . catu
rmmukhapadāṁbhōjā jjātaṁ ta trāsti rā
jakaṁ . jaitraṁ vicitravibhavaṁ sarvvōrvvī
rakṣaṇakṣamaṁ . gatēṣu kēṣuci ttatra rāja
sūdāttakarmmanu . Anaṁttavibhavakhyātō
jātaḥ kētamahipatiḥ . prakhyātaya
śasa stasya tanayō nayakōvidaḥ . vidu
ṣā magraṇī rbbhīmarājō bhīmaparā
kramaḥ . manmagētakṣitipati sta
tsūnu ssūrivallabhaḥ . ya tpratāpō
jagadvyāpī śrūyatē kṣitimaṁḍḍalē .

tasya patnī bayyamāṁbā rūḍhaudāryya guṇānvitā
viśrutaśrutasaṁppannavidvacciṁttāmaṇi svayaṁ
tatputrō gaṇapakṣmāpō karaḥ pratti
pāṭimahāgrāmēvrittīrbrāhmaṇasātkarōt .
svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁśrīmanmahāmaṁ
ḍḍalēśvara kōṭagaṇapatidēvamahārājulu śa
kavarṣaṁbulu 1156 gu nēṁṭi saṁkrāṁtiya
ṁdu tamakuṁ dharmmārtthaṁbugā niccina vri
ttulu haritu laina viśvanādhasōmayā
julaku kha 1 tu 10 vīri koḍkulu śrīkaṁṭha
bhaṭṭōpādhyāyulaku kha 1 tū0 kaśipulaina kāma
dēvapeddi kha 1 tu 10 [A]tru laina valkana peddi kha 1 tu 10
kuṁḍḍinu laina nāgadēvapeddi kha 1 lauhitulai
na sarvvadēvapeddi kha 1 śrīvatsu laina
kommanapeddi kha 1 velagu

penubartti vṛttulu kāśyapu laina kāma dēvapeddi
koḍku kēśavakūci kha 1 tu 10 kaśyapu laina
[E]ṟapōtapeddi kha 1 kuṁḍḍinu laina viddana
ppana kha 1 mārttaṁḍi Amarepeddi kha 1 tu 10
vīri nūkappana prattipāṭi kha 1 tu 10 Ubha
yakavi narasiṁhu kha 3 svadattāṁ pa
radattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ
ṣaṣṭi rvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jā
yatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 10.281 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
